description.en: Mantou's stuffed cousin: a soft, faintly sweet wheat wrapper is pleated shut, twelve folds or more by tradition, around juicy pork and cabbage, then steamed in bamboo baskets until pillowy. Street food and breakfast across China.
description.de: Mantous gefüllter Vetter: Ein weicher, leicht süßer Weizenteig wird verschlossen gefaltet – der Überlieferung nach mit zwölf oder mehr Falten – um saftiges Schweinefleisch und Kohl, dann in Bambuskörben zu Wolkenweichheit gedämpft. Streetfood und Frühstück in ganz China.
description.es: El primo relleno del mantou: una masa de trigo suave y algo dulce se pliega y cierra, doce pliegues o más según la tradición, en torno a cerdo jugoso y col, y se cuece al vapor en cestas de bambú hasta quedar esponjosa. Comida callejera y desayuno en China.
description.fr: Le cousin farci du mantou : une pâte de blé souple et un peu sucrée est pliée et scellée, douze plis ou plus selon la tradition, autour de porc juteux et de chou, puis cuite à la vapeur en panier de bambou jusqu'à devenir moelleuse. Street food chinoise.

origin.note: Descended from mantou once cooks began stuffing the steamed dough; Song-dynasty texts (960-1279) already distinguish filled baozi from plain mantou.

label.es: salsa de soja, oscura y clara

yield.shape: pleated round bun with pork-cabbage filling

keeping.note: Freezes raw or cooked exceptionally well; resteam from frozen for a few extra minutes.

method.title: Mix the dough
method.summary: Combine flour, yeast, sugar and oil, then work in water to a smooth dough; let it rise until doubled, 45 minutes to an hour.

method.title: Make the filling
method.summary: Squeeze excess water from the cabbage, then mix it with ground pork, ginger, soy sauces, and a little salt and sugar.

method.title: Divide
method.summary: Divide the risen dough into pieces and roll each into a wrapper with a thick center and thin edges.

method.title: Fill and pleat
method.summary: Spoon filling into the center and pleat the edges closed with a twisting motion, gathering them at the top.

method.title: Rest
method.summary: Let the shaped buns rest 20-30 minutes before cooking.

method.title: Steam
method.summary: Steam over boiling water for about 18 minutes, then let the buns rest briefly off the heat before lifting the lid.

source.adaptation: Dough and filling grams kept as sourced; filling condensed to its most essential aromatics for this entry.
